===Pokémon===
This listing is of Trip's known {{OBP|Pokémon|species}} in {{aniseries|PTS}}:

{{TrainerPoké
|main=yes
|trainer=Trip
|pkmn=Serperior
|stage1=Snivy
|stage2=Servine
|gender=male
|type1=Grass
|img=Trip Serperior.png
|epnum=BW001
|epname=In The Shadow of Zekrom!
|vajp=Kiyotaka Furushima
|vaen=Jason Griffith
|desc={{p|Serperior}} is Trip's first partner Pokémon, given to him by [[Professor Juniper]] when he was a {{p|Snivy}}. He was used to battle Ash in ''[[BW001|The Shadow of Zekrom!]]''.

He was revealed to have evolved into a Servine before ''[[BW005|Triple Leaders, Team Threats!]]''. This was revealed to Ash in ''[[BW010|A Rival Battle for Club Champ!]]''.

He was revealed to have evolved into a Serperior before ''[[BW090|Jostling for the Junior Cup!]]''.}}

{{TrainerPoké
| trainer = Trip
| pkmn = Tranquill
| type1 = Normal
| type2 = Flying
| img = Trip Tranquill.png
| epnum = BW010
| epname = A Rival Battle for Club Champ!
| vajp = Unshō Ishizuka
| vaen = Erica Schroeder
| desc = {{p|Tranquill}} is the second Pokémon that Trip was revealed to have. Its first appearance was in ''[[BW010|A Rival Battle for Club Champ!]]'', where Trip used it to battle [[Ash's Oshawott]], {{AP|Tepig}}, and {{AP|Pikachu}}. It was shown to be powerful, as its Super Luck Ability allowed it to take down both Oshawott and Tepig with two hits. It beat the first two opponents, then lost to Pikachu, even after its Work Up and Super Luck combo strengthened it to set up Servine's win.

It was later used in ''[[BW022|A Venipede Stampede!]]'' to rescue [[Ash's Pidove]] from a {{p|Venipede}}'s {{m|Sludge Bomb}} attack and help round up the other Centipede Pokémon.

Tranquill's known moves are {{m|Aerial Ace}}, {{m|Double Team}}, {{m|Work Up}}, and {{m|Air Cutter}}, and its Ability is {{a|Super Luck}}.
}}

{{TrainerPoké
| trainer = Trip
| pkmn = Frillish
| gender = male
| type1 = Water
| type2 = Ghost
| img = Trip Frillish.png
| epnum = BW010
| epname = A Rival Battle for Club Champ!
| vajp = Misato Fukuen
| vaen = Kayzie Rogers
| desc = {{p|Frillish}}, the third Pokémon that Trip was revealed to have, made its sole appearance during the Trip's battle with Ash in ''[[BW010|A Rival Battle for Club Champ!]]''. He first faced off against {{AP|Pidove}}, securing a victory. Subsequently, he engaged in a lengthy and challenging battle with [[Ash's Snivy]], weathering Snivy's Grass-type attacks. Ultimately, Frillish triumphed by taking advantage of its Cursed Body Ability against Snivy's constant use of physical moves.
 
Frillish reappeared in Ash's flashback of his past battles with Trip in ''[[BW104|Mission: Defeat Your Rival!]]''.

Frillish's known moves are {{m|Protect}}, {{m|Water Pulse}}, {{m|Night Shade}}, and {{m|Hex}}, and his Ability is {{a|Cursed Body}}.
}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Trip
|pkmn=Lampent
|type1=Ghost
|type2=Fire
|img=Trip Lampent.png
|epnum=BW022
|epname=A Venipede Stampede!
|vajp=Shin-ichiro Miki
|vaen=Sean Schemmel
|desc={{p|Lampent}} is the fourth Pokémon that Trip was revealed to have. Its only appearance was in ''[[BW022|A Venipede Stampede!]]'', where Trip used it to battle a swarm of wild {{p|Venipede}} in [[Castelia City]].

Lampent's known moves are {{m|Flamethrower}} and {{m|Shadow Ball}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
| trainer = Trip
| pkmn = Vanillite
| type1 = Ice
| img = Trip Vanillite.png
| epnum = BW031
| epname = Ash and Trip's Third Battle!
| vajp = Chika Fujimura
| vaen = Emily Jenness
| desc = {{p|Vanillite}}, Trip's fifth known Pokémon, debuted in ''[[BW031|Ash and Trip's Third Battle!]]''. It was first seen when Ash inadvertently foiled Trip's attempt to catch a {{p|Palpitoad}}. Later, this Ice-type Pokémon battled Ash's Tepig. Despite the type disadvantage, Vanillite's strong defense allowed it to withstand Tepig's attacks, resulting in a tie.
 
Vanillite reappeared in Ash's flashback of his past battles with Trip in ''[[BW104|Mission: Defeat Your Rival!]]''.

Vanillite's known moves are {{m|Ice Beam}}, {{m|Icicle Spear}}, {{m|Ice Shard}}, and {{m|Blizzard}}.
}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Trip
|pkmn=Conkeldurr
|stage1=Timburr
|stage2=Gurdurr
|type1=Fighting
|img=Trip {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Timburr|1=Gurdurr}}.png
|cap=Trip's {{#switch: {{#expr: {{#time: U}} mod 2}}|0=Timburr|1=Gurdurr}}
|img2=Trip Conkeldurr.png
|cap2=Trip's Conkeldurr
|epnum=BW031
|epname=Ash and Trip's Third Battle!
|vajp=Kenta Miyake
|vajpnote=As Timburr and Gurdurr
|vajp2=Kensuke Satō
|vajp2note=As Conkeldurr
|vaen=Bill Rogers
|desc={{p|Conkeldurr}} is the sixth Pokémon that Trip was revealed to have. Conkeldurr first appeared in ''[[BW031|Ash and Trip's Third Battle!]]'' as a {{p|Timburr}}. It battled Ash's Oshawott and after a momentary pause in their battle, it was defeated by a single {{m|Razor Shell}}. 

It was revealed to have evolved into {{p|Gurdurr}} sometime prior to ''[[BW040|Cilan Versus Trip, Ash Versus Georgia!]]'', where it was used in the [[Club Battle]] competition. It went up against [[Cilan's Dwebble]] and despite putting up a strong fight, in which it even managed to crack Dwebble's rock, it was defeated. 

It was revealed to have evolved into Conkeldurr sometime prior to the registration for the [[Clubsplosion]] tournament in ''[[BW070|The Clubsplosion Begins!]]''. It was first shown when Trip showed it off to Ash and his friends during registration for the tournament. It would then appear in [[BW071|the next episode]], where it battled [[Bianca's Emboar]]. It started the battle off strong by making use of its pillars and cornering its opponent with a powerful string of attacks. In the [[BW072|following episode]], despite its strong start, Conkeldurr was defeated after an unorthodox use of {{m|Fling}}, knocking Trip out of the competition in the process.

Conkeldurr's known moves are {{m|Strength}}, {{m|Low Sweep}}, {{m|Dynamic Punch}}, {{m|Rock Smash}}, {{m|Stone Edge}}, {{m|Bulk Up}}, and {{m|Rock Tomb}}.}}
